John procrastinated the entire afternoon instead of working on his assignment.

John and Mary decided to postpone their wedding due to the coronavirus outbreak.
Peter’s flight to London was delayed due to a thunderstorm.

Peter’s flight to London was delayed due to a thunderstorm.
